category_sources: source_facts.description says Lisette is a language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go; official homepage says the same.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lisette; official homepage https://lisette.run displays Lisette as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Lisette homepage is the best confirmed documentation surface, with language overview, examples, playground, and repository link.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a Rust-inspired language compiling to Go with ADTs, pattern matching, and Hindley-Milner typing.
